steps: Submit French Form 5001 to request reimbursement of EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Reference FR-NO tax treaty Article 10 specifying 15% maximum rate on dividends to support the claim
Provide BNP Paribas account 901234567 statement showing 13.5% tax withheld vs. treaty-allowed 15% rate
Follow up with French tax authorities within 3 years of payment date for full refund processing

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
